title: RadioSign
description: Link signs' text accross distances and dimensions, wirelessly!
body:
## This is a very simple datapack that enables you to link signs together.

**Linked signs share the same front text**, back text, colors, glow, etc.

They **can be waxed**, but wax will not transmit to other signs. A waxed sign cannot be edited by hand, but it will continue to fetch messages from the network.

Radio signs support **multiple channels**, each sign can be linked to one channel at a time.

*Note:* **hanging signs** are supported alongside regular signs, however they are smaller than pre-1.20 signs, meaning that the **text might get cropped**. See [the gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/radiosign/gallery) for examples.

## Steps to link a sign to the network:
- Stand inside the sign;
- Run ``/trigger radio set <channel>`` command, where <channel> can be any integer above 0;
- The sign is now linked!

If you want to unlink a sign from the network, simply break it.
